goal: 修复 show JSON 同时暴露物化视图

summary.title: 兼容暴露 show 物化视图
summary.what: 调整 Service.Show：当本地 draft cache 与 materialized IntentView 同时存在时，继续返回 intent/turns 兼容旧 JSON 消费者，并额外返回 view，让调用方可读取 summary、code_commit、publication 等物化字段；补充回归测试锁住该 additive 行为。
summary.why: show 当前先命中本地 proposed draft，可能遮住已经存在的 materialized view，导致调用方看不到 published/proposed 的 summary/code_commit/publication。只返回 view 会破坏旧脚本；同时返回 intent 和 view 是 no-breaking 的修复方式。
summary.user_goal: 修复 show JSON 同时暴露物化视图

decisions.chose: 在本地 draft 与 materialized view 同时存在时，保留 .data.intent/.data.turns，并额外返回 .data.view。
decisions.rationale: 这是 additive JSON 变化，旧消费者继续读 intent，新消费者可以优先读 view。
zsh/Python heredoc 是特殊 agent 用法问题，不应作为主 workflow 规则；本修复用代码和测试约束 CLI 行为。

rejected.reason: 这会移除本地 draft 的 .data.intent，对已有 JSON 消费者是 breaking change。
这不能解决 materialized view 被本地 cache 遮住的 CLI 行为问题。

review_notes: Focused verification passed: go test ./internal/engine -run TestShow -count=1.
Smoke verification passed: go run . show int_afac7e68 --json can read the materialized proposed/published view with code_commit/title.
This branch is independent from PR #174 and only touches internal/engine/intent.go plus internal/engine/engine_test.go.

architectural_claims: ShowResult remains compatible for draft consumers while exposing materialized IntentView when available.
Terminal materialized views still override stale local draft cache as before.
behavioral_changes: mainline show --json may include both data.intent and data.view when local draft cache and materialized view coexist.
Existing consumers that read data.intent continue to work because the change is additive.
migration_notes: No migration required; affected show JSON responses gain an additional view field.
